experiment: T1 iter46 ExtraTrees-only robustification of iter34
purpose: Follow the single robustness candidate from audit_t1_iter34_base_item_decomp.py; try to retain iter34-like T1 performance while clearing P2 noisy-test-X bootstrap fragility.

cohort.target: T1 = sum MDS-UPDRS Part III items 9-14
cohort.filter: PD subjects complete for items 9-14 plus auxiliary items 15 and 18
cohort.n93_caveat: WPD002 excluded because auxiliary item 18 is missing; prior bound showed non-load-bearing.

lockbox.headline: mean prediction over the five ET-only seed OOF vectors
comparators: iter12 honest canonical floor on same SIDs when available
lockbox.decision_rule: If LOOCV <= iter12-on-same-SIDs or bootstrap frac>0 vs iter12 < 0.95, stop. If above iter12 but below iter34, report only as robust candidate, not ceiling break. If above iter34, require a separate null-gate audit before any canonical promotion.
